perturbation.original_text: No Warranty . ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PROVIDED "AS IS." NEIT HER PARTY MAKES ANY WARRANTIES, EXPRESS, IMPLIED OR OTHERWISE, REGARDING ITS ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS OR PERFORMANCE.
perturbation.changed_text: No Warranty. ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PROVIDED "AS IS," except that the disclosing party warrants that it has the legal right to disclose such information. NEIT HER PARTY MAKES ANY OTHER WARRANTIES, EXPRESS, IMPLIED OR OTHERWISE, REGARDING ITS ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS OR PERFORMANCE.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'except that the disclosing party warrants that it has the legal right to disclose such information' an express warranty is created. This directly contradicts the blanket disclaimer of all warranties, express or implied. This in-text contradiction creates confusion about the extent of the warranty disclaimer and whether the disclosing party can be held liable for disclosing information they didn't have the right to disclose. This means there is an in text contradiction due to the added sentence, that now the partied will be responsible for the right to disclose of their own party, and not the responsibility of the other party to ensure that.
perturbation.contradicted_text: No Warranty. ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PROVIDED "AS IS," except that the disclosing party warrants that it has the legal right to disclose such information. NEIT HER PARTY MAKES ANY OTHER WARRANTIES, EXPRESS, IMPLIED OR OTHERWISE, REGARDING ITS ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS OR PERFORMANCE. Paid For Work. All paid for information, work, designs, ideas will become the property of the payor (the person or company paying).
perturbation.justification: The original text contained a blanket 'No Warranty' clause. The changed text introduces an express warranty ('except that the disclosing party warrants that it has the legal right to disclose such information'). This directly contradicts the 'NEIT HER PARTY MAKES ANY OTHER WARRANTIES, EXPRESS, IMPLIED OR OTHERWISE' clause also present in both the changed and contradicted texts. The explanation correctly points out that this creates confusion about the extent of the warranty disclaimer, and it means there is now responsibility on the disclosing party that was not there before. Therefore, a strong in-text contradiction exists because an express warranty is created where previously none existed.

perturbation.original_text: This document contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, and neither party shall have any obligation, express or implied by law, with respect to trade secret or proprietary information of the other party except as set forth herein.
perturbation.changed_text: This document contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, except for any prior agreements, whether written or oral, that relate to the same subject matter, and neither party shall have any obligation, express or implied by law, with respect to trade secret or proprietary information of the other party except as set forth herein.
perturbation.explanation: By adding 'except for any prior agreements, whether written or oral, that relate to the same subject matter', the entire agreement clause is undermined. It is no longer clear if the document represents the complete agreement, because prior agreements are now potentially included. This change creates an in-text contradiction regarding what exactly constitutes 'the entire agreement' between the parties. The in-text contradiction is because before the prior agreements were not considered, now the statement changes so prior agreements matter.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This document contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof, except for any prior agreements, whether written or oral, that relate to the same subject matter, and neither party shall have any obligation, express or implied by law, with respect to trade secret or proprietary information of the other party except as set forth herein. The invalidity or unenforceability of any provision of this Agreement, or any of its terms or provisions, will not affect the validity of this Agreement as a whole, which will at all times remain in full force and effect. A failure to enforce any provision of this Agreement will not constitute a waiver thereof or of any other provision.
perturbation.justification: The original text states the document contains the 'entire agreement'. The changed text modifies this to include exceptions for 'prior agreements'. The contradicted text is identical to the changed text and it contains the same contradiction, where it claims that the document is the entire agreement, but also acknowledges that prior agreements exist. This is a structural flaw that creates an in-text contradiction (as per the definition) because it is unclear which agreement(s) govern the relationship, creating uncertainty about obligations and rights.
